description: Normal text requires 4.5:1 contrast ratio; large text (18px+) requires 3:1
do: Verify every text/bg pair with WCAG contrast checker before shipping
avoid: Assume light grey text on white is readable; trust designer eye

description: AAA requires 7:1 for normal text; prefer for body text in consumer apps
do: Use 7:1 for primary body text in healthcare education government contexts
avoid: Apply AAA only to decorative text; ignore in all consumer contexts

description: Keyboard focus indicator must be visible; 2px minimum; not removed by CSS
do: Add :focus-visible ring 2-4px offset 2px; use CSS outline not box-shadow for printing
avoid: Use outline:none without replacement; remove :focus for aesthetic reasons

description: All meaningful images require descriptive alt text; decorative images use alt=''
do: Write alt text describing what the image conveys not what it depicts literally
avoid: Use filename as alt; use vague alts like 'image'; skip alt on informative images

description: Interactive elements without visible text require aria-label or aria-labelledby
do: Add aria-label='Close dialog' to icon-only buttons; test with screen reader
avoid: Add aria-label that duplicates visible text; skip aria for icon-only controls

description: Full keyboard operation required: Tab/Enter/Space/Escape/Arrow keys
do: Test entire app with keyboard only; ensure all interactive elements reachable via Tab
avoid: Make keyboard path depend on mouse hover; use div onClick without role

description: Heading levels h1-h6 must be sequential; never skip a level
do: Use one h1 per page; h2 for sections; h3 for subsections; never use h4 after h2
avoid: Use headings for visual styling; skip from h1 to h4; place h2 inside h4 parent

description: Skip to main content link must be first focusable element on each page
do: Add Skip to content as first element
avoid: Omit skip links on long nav-heavy pages; hide them with display:none permanently

description: Information must not be conveyed by color alone
do: Pair color with icon text or pattern to convey state; use aria-live for dynamic changes
avoid: Use red/green only to show error/success without icon or text label

description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query; reduce or eliminate animations
do: Wrap all animations in @media(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference){}
avoid: Apply animations globally without reduced-motion override; assume animation is safe

description: Support system text size scaling; do not truncate at 2x system size
do: Use em/rem units; test at 200% browser zoom; avoid fixed-height containers on text
avoid: Use px for body font sizes; clip text with overflow:hidden on text containers

description: DOM source order must match visual reading order for screen reader users
do: Build layouts where DOM order matches visual flow; use flex-direction for reorder only
avoid: Use CSS order to reverse visual from DOM order without aria-flowto fallback

description: Minimum 44x44 CSS pixels for all interactive touch targets (Apple); 48x48 Material
do: Use min-height: 44px; pad small icons to meet target size visually and functionally
avoid: Place 24px icons without padding; rely on proximity without meeting tap target minimums
source: Apple HIG 2025 Touch / Material Design 3 SC 2.5.8

description: 8px minimum spacing between adjacent touch targets
do: Add margin/gap 8px+ between all adjacent buttons links form elements
avoid: Stack interactive elements with 0px gap; rely on UI density over usability

description: Provide immediate feedback (<100ms) for all user actions
do: Show loading spinner skeleton or progress within 100ms of user action
avoid: Leave UI frozen during async operations; use alert-based blocking progress
source: Material Design 3 / Nielsen Norman 1993 Response Times

description: Critical functionality must not depend on hover-only affordances
do: Add tap/click alternative for hover-revealed actions; test with touch device
avoid: Reveal primary actions on hover only; make menu items accessible only via hover

description: Interactive state changes must have 100-300ms transition; not instant 0ms
do: Use transition: all 150ms ease for button hover; 200ms for larger transitions
avoid: Use 0ms instant state changes on all interactions; apply 600ms+ on every interaction
source: Material Design 3 Motion / Apple HIG Motion

description: Prevent irreversible errors: confirm destructive actions; undo where possible
do: Add confirmation dialog for deletes; provide undo for sends; use soft delete pattern
avoid: Execute deletes immediately without confirm; rely on back-button recovery

description: Clickable elements need adequate padding; text links in body need 4px+ padding
do: Add padding: 4px 8px to inline links; padding: 8px 16px to buttons
avoid: Use padding:0 on clickable elements; make only text characters clickable

description: Use WebP or AVIF for photos; SVG for icons; PNG only for pixel-art
do: Serve <picture> with AVIF/WebP sources and JPEG fallback; use SVG for all icons
avoid: Serve JPEG for hero images with no modern format fallback; use PNG for icons

description: Images and non-critical content should load lazily below the fold
do: Add loading='lazy' to all images not in the initial viewport; use Intersection Observer
avoid: Eager-load all page images including those far below fold; assume fast connection

description: Reserve space for async content to prevent CLS; CLS score must be < 0.1
do: Set width height attributes on all images; use aspect-ratio CSS; skeleton loaders
avoid: Allow content to shift layout on load; add images without dimensions

description: Time from user interaction to visible response must be < 200ms (INP)
do: Defer non-critical JS; use requestAnimationFrame for DOM updates; debounce inputs
avoid: Run heavy sync JS on main thread during interaction; block paint with JS

description: Prevent font FOUT/FOIT: use font-display: swap; preload critical fonts
do: Add <link rel='preload' as='font'> for LCP-critical fonts; use font-display:swap
avoid: Load fonts without font-display; block render waiting for webfont download
source: W3C CSS Fonts / Web Vitals LCP

description: Visual styles must be internally consistent; no random mixing of design systems
do: Define CSS custom properties for all tokens; use them everywhere; no raw hex in components
avoid: Mix flat icons with skeuomorphic shadows; use both rounded and sharp cards arbitrarily

description: Use SVG icons not emoji not icon fonts; size to 24x24 as base unit
do: Use inline SVG or SVG sprite; set aria-hidden='true'; size via width/height attr
avoid: Use emoji as UI icons; use icon fonts (font-awesome) as primary icon system

description: Brand colors must be defined as CSS custom properties not raw hex values
do: Define --color-primary --color-background etc. at :root; use only tokens in components
avoid: Scatter raw hex values in component CSS; define brand color in multiple locations
source: CSS Custom Properties / Material Design 3 Tokens

description: Border-radius must be systematic; pick one scale and use it throughout
do: Define --radius-sm --radius-md --radius-lg as tokens; never mix 4px and 16px randomly
avoid: Mix 0px 4px 8px 16px 50px border-radius without a system; round some cards but not others

description: Build layouts mobile-first; use min-width breakpoints not max-width
do: Write base styles for mobile; add complexity at min-width: 768px and above
avoid: Build desktop layout first; add max-width: 767px overrides; double override complexity

description: Viewport meta tag must be present; must not disable user zoom
do: Use <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width initial-scale=1'>
avoid: Add maximum-scale=1 user-scalable=no to viewport meta; disable user zoom

description: Page must not require horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport width
do: Test at 320px; use max-width: 100%; avoid fixed-width elements wider than viewport
avoid: Ship fixed-width 1024px containers without responsive fallback; rely on desktop-only

description: Optimal reading line-length is 60-75 characters; max-width on paragraphs
do: Use max-width: 65ch on article content; prose containers capped at 720px
avoid: Allow text to stretch full viewport width on large screens; no max-width on articles

description: Use CSS Grid for 2D layouts; Flexbox for 1D; avoid absolute positioning for flow
do: Use display: grid with named areas for page layout; flex for component internals
avoid: Use position: absolute for stacking normal document-flow content; misuse Flexbox for Grid

description: Use a consistent spacing scale (4px/8px/16px/24px/32px/48px/64px)
do: Define --space-1 through --space-16 as multiples of 4px; use only those values
avoid: Use arbitrary spacing values like 11px 17px 23px without a system
source: Material Design 3 Spacing / Apple HIG Spatial

description: Body text minimum 16px; never below 12px for any UI text; 14px min for data cells
do: Set html { font-size: 100% } (= 16px); scale up with clamp() for larger screens
avoid: Set html { font-size: 62.5% } (= 10px) then forget to verify 12px child elements

description: Body text line-height minimum 1.5; heading line-height 1.1-1.3
do: Use line-height: 1.5 on body; 1.2 on display headings; 1.4 on UI labels
avoid: Use line-height: 1 on body text; use fixed px line-heights that break at system text sizes

description: Text must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal; 3:1 large); prefer AAA for body
do: Check every text/bg combo; dark mode needs separate verification
avoid: Assume light grey #999 on white is fine; assume dark mode passes without checking

description: Use semantic color tokens not raw hex; tokens adapt to theme switches
do: Define --color-text-primary --color-text-secondary etc.; never raw hex in components
avoid: Scatter #1E293B in 40 CSS rules; make dark mode override each one individually

description: Use a modular type scale (1.25x or 1.333x ratio); not random font sizes
do: Use clamp() for fluid type: font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.25rem)
avoid: Set heading sizes as arbitrary px values like 22px 31px 19px without a scale

description: Transitions 150-300ms; entrance animations 200-400ms; never > 600ms for UI
do: Use 150ms for hover; 300ms for modal enter; 400ms for page transition
avoid: Use 800ms+ transitions on interactive hover states; animate all 60+ elements at once
source: Material Design 3 Motion / Apple HIG Motion

description: Animation must convey meaning or spatial relationship; not purely decorative
do: Use slide-from-right for navigation forward; slide-from-left for back; fade for overlay
avoid: Add bounce animation to every button press; spin every loading state

description: Never animate width/height; animate transform and opacity only for performance
do: Use transform: scaleX() instead of animating width; opacity for show/hide
avoid: Animate max-height for accordion expand; animate width for progress bars
source: W3C CSS Transforms / Web Vitals CLS

description: Elements should enter/exit from direction that matches their origin in the UI
do: Drawer slides from the side it occupies; tooltip appears near trigger element
avoid: Make sidebar slide from top; make tooltips appear opposite to trigger element

description: Every form input must have a visible label; placeholder is not a label
do: Use <label for='...'>; never placeholder-only; show label even when field is focused
avoid: Remove label when user starts typing; use placeholder text as the only label

description: Show error messages directly below the field that caused the error
do: Place error <span role='alert'> immediately after the input; 4px gap
avoid: Show only a top-of-form error summary; use generic 'Fix errors above' message only

description: Provide helper text for non-obvious requirements before user makes an error
do: Show format hint below input before user types: 'Use format YYYY-MM-DD'
avoid: Wait until validation to reveal requirements; show requirement only after error state

description: Use correct HTML autocomplete attributes on all personal data fields
do: Add autocomplete='email' 'name' 'current-password' etc. to all personal fields
avoid: Disable autocomplete on all form fields; add autocomplete='off' to email fields

description: Show only fields relevant to current step; progressive not dump-everything
do: Show shipping address only when 'ship to different address' checked; multi-step for 6+ fields
avoid: Present 15-field form on one screen without any conditional logic or step flow

description: Back navigation must return to previous state not to top of screen
do: Use history.pushState for SPA nav; restore scroll position on back; preserve form state
avoid: Replace full app history stack on nav; send user to top of page on back button press

description: Bottom navigation bar max 5 items; label every icon; selected state visible
do: Use 3-5 tabs with icon + label; selected tab color + underline or fill
avoid: Use 7-tab bottom nav without labels; rely on icon recognition only for meaning
source: Apple HIG 2025 Tab Bars / Material Design 3

description: Add breadcrumb navigation for content 3+ levels deep; use schema markup
do: Use aria-label='breadcrumb' <nav>; add JSON-LD BreadcrumbList schema
avoid: Add breadcrumbs without structured data; use > as separator without aria

description: All pages and states must be deep-linkable; use URL params for filters/tabs
do: Encode tab state in URL query params; encode filter state in URL; use history API
avoid: Use in-memory state only for tabs; make filter results not shareable via URL

description: Current page or section must be visually indicated with more than color alone
do: Use aria-current='page' on active nav link; combine color + underline + font-weight
avoid: Use color-only active state; no aria-current; rely on user memory of location

description: All charts must have legends; chart colors must have text label alternatives
do: Place legend adjacent to chart; include value in tooltip not just label
avoid: Show pie chart with colors only; no legend; no value labels on segments

description: Charts must have accessible tooltips; keyboard accessible; screen-reader readable
do: Add role='tooltip' + aria-describedby; ensure keyboard can reach data points
avoid: Use mouse-hover-only tooltips; provide no keyboard or touch access to chart data

description: Chart color palettes must be safe for deuteranopia and protanopia
do: Use blue/orange or blue/yellow palettes not red/green; add pattern fills
avoid: Use red/green as the sole differentiator between success/failure in charts

description: In multi-CLI interfaces separate each provider's UI affordances visually
do: Use provider-badge color tokens to distinguish Claude Codex Gemini output areas
avoid: Mix provider outputs in undifferentiated UI; confuse users about which AI responded

description: Default IJFW designs use zero external dependencies; system fonts only
do: Build first pass with system font stack; add webfonts as progressive enhancement
avoid: Default to CDN fonts that break offline-capable apps; require Google Fonts

description: All UI empty states and error messages must use positive framing not negative
do: Use 'Nothing here yet -- start by adding one' not 'No items found'
avoid: Use 'Not found' 'Error' 'Failed' as UI message headers; negative framing in empty states
source: IJFW Design System v1.1 / Sutherland Reframing

description: Every design pass must log an observation to the IJFW ledger
do: Call design-pass.sh at end of design pass; verify .ijfw/design-pass.json written
avoid: Skip observation logging; treat design pass as ephemeral; lose design audit trail

description: Set color-scheme: light dark in CSS; add meta name='color-scheme' to HTML
do: Add <meta name='color-scheme' content='light dark'> in <head>; use prefers-color-scheme
avoid: Rely on JS-only dark mode toggle; ignore system preference; flash on load
source: W3C CSS Color 5 / Apple HIG 2025 Dark Mode

description: Use elevation via color lightness shifts not shadows in dark mode
do: In dark mode use lighter surface colors (not darker) for elevation: surface > #1E1E1E > #252525
avoid: Use box-shadow with dark colors in dark mode; shadows invisible on dark backgrounds

description: Images with white backgrounds need dark-mode treatment; use CSS filter
do: Add CSS filter: brightness(0.8) on white-background images in dark mode
avoid: Serve white-background product images unchanged in dark mode; harsh visual pop

description: Respect device safe areas: home indicator notch dynamic island
do: Use env(safe-area-inset-bottom) for bottom nav; padding-top for notch
avoid: Place navigation bar at fixed bottom:0 without safe area compensation; obscure home indicator
source: Apple HIG 2025 Safe Areas / W3C CSS Environment Variables

description: Prevent unintended scroll bounce on iOS fixed elements
do: Add -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch to scroll containers; overscroll-behavior: none to body
avoid: Allow body scroll bounce on iOS; cause fixed footer to jump on scroll

description: Prevent iOS auto-zoom on focus: minimum input font-size 16px
do: Set input font-size: 16px minimum; do not rely on design-level prevention
avoid: Use 14px input font-size and get surprised by iOS auto-zoom on focus

description: UI copy should target 8th grade reading level; plain language standard
do: Use Hemingway app or equivalent to verify; avoid jargon; explain acronyms
avoid: Write legal-level prose in UI messages; use internal jargon in user-facing labels

description: Link text must describe destination; avoid 'click here' and 'read more'
do: Use 'Read the WCAG accessibility guide' not 'Click here' or bare URL as link text
avoid: Use 'Click here' as link text; use 'Read more' without context for screen readers

description: Empty states must include: what's empty + why + call to action
do: Show empty state with illustration/icon + explanation + primary CTA button
avoid: Show blank space or '0 results' without explanation or next-step guidance
source: Nielsen Norman Group Empty States 2024 / IJFW Positive Framing

description: Error messages must explain: what went wrong + why + how to fix it
do: 'Your session expired. Please sign in again to continue.' with Sign In CTA
avoid: Show 'Error 401' or 'Something went wrong' without cause or recovery path

description: Layouts must adapt for RTL languages; do not hard-code LTR
do: Use CSS logical properties: margin-inline-start not margin-left; dir=rtl testing
avoid: Use margin-left/right for directional spacing; ship without testing in RTL layout
source: WCAG 2.2 / W3C Internationalization / CSS Logical Properties

description: UI must accommodate 30-40% text expansion in translation
do: Test with German French Spanish which expand 30-40% vs English; use fluid containers
avoid: Design for English string length only; use fixed-width buttons that clip translated text

description: Format dates numbers currency per locale; use Intl.DateTimeFormat API
do: Use new Intl.DateTimeFormat(locale).format(date); never hard-code MM/DD/YYYY
avoid: Ship MM/DD/YYYY dates to global audience; assume 1,234.56 is universally understood

description: All state-changing forms must include CSRF protection
do: Add CSRF token to all POST forms; verify server-side; use SameSite=Strict cookies
avoid: Trust form submissions without CSRF token; assume same-origin policy is sufficient

description: Sanitize all user inputs before rendering to prevent XSS
do: Use textContent not innerHTML for user data; use DOMPurify for rich text
avoid: Use innerHTML with user-supplied data; trust user input is safe for direct DOM insertion

description: Never display sensitive data (password SSN card number) in plain text
do: Use input type='password'; mask card numbers showing only last 4; password-reveal toggle
avoid: Show full card number in UI; echo password in confirmation field as plain text

description: Layer content with clear visual hierarchy; primary > secondary > tertiary
do: Use contrast size weight and spacing to create hierarchy; test with CSS disabled
avoid: Make everything the same visual weight; rely on position alone to suggest importance
source: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.3.1 / Apple HIG Visual Hierarchy

description: Match information density to context and user expertise
do: Use density modes: comfortable for consumer / compact for power user; prefer token to expose
avoid: Ship power-user density to consumer audience; ship consumer density to power users

description: Each view should have one primary action or focal point per screen
do: Bold one primary CTA; secondary actions visually subdued; never 3+ equally weighted CTAs
avoid: Place 4 equal-weight CTA buttons; make all actions visually equivalent
source: Nielsen Norman Group CTA 2024 / Apple HIG

description: Confirm successful actions immediately with visible non-blocking feedback
do: Use toast notification positioned top-right for 3s; inline success icon on form submit
avoid: Use alert() for success; require page reload to confirm; stay silent on success

description: Show progress for any operation > 1 second
do: Show determinate progress bar when length is known; spinner when indeterminate
avoid: Leave UI frozen for 3+ seconds without any indication work is happening

description: Support undo for destructive or hard-to-reverse actions
do: Show undo toast for 5s after delete; support Ctrl+Z in text editors
avoid: Execute irrecoverable delete immediately; confirm only with modal; no undo path

description: Data tables require headers roles captions; sortable tables require ARIA
do: Add <thead> with <th scope='col'>; role='grid' for interactive tables; aria-sort on sortable
avoid: Use <div> grid for data tables; omit scope; skip aria-sort on sort controls

description: Large lists need pagination or virtual scroll; never dump 1000+ items into DOM
do: Use pagination for static content; virtual list for real-time; page size selector
avoid: Render 2000 rows in DOM; use window.scrollTop polling for 'infinite' scroll

description: Format large numbers for readability; use appropriate precision
do: Show 1.2M not 1200000; 42.5% not 0.425; currency as $1,234.56 with locale
avoid: Show raw database values: 1200000 0.425 without formatting or units

description: Use CSS Container Queries for component-level responsive design
do: Use @container for card/sidebar components that change layout based on their own width
avoid: Use only media queries; force all responsive decisions at page viewport level
source: W3C CSS Container Queries / WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.10

description: Add @media print styles for any content users may print
do: Add @media print { nav, .sidebar { display: none } body { font-size: 12pt } }
avoid: Ship web app without print styles; force users to screenshot for printing
source: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.8 / W3C CSS Media Types

description: All images must be fluid and respect container bounds
do: Add img { max-width: 100%; height: auto } globally; use srcset for resolution switching
avoid: Allow images to overflow container; use fixed pixel widths on elements

description: Run design-pass before writing any UI code in IJFW workflow
do: Invoke ijfw-design at plan phase for any task touching html css jsx tsx components/
avoid: Start writing UI code without checking design tokens palette typography

description: IJFW preflight warns when UI files changed without a recent design pass
do: design-pass gate in preflight-versions.json checks for .ijfw/design-pass.json
avoid: Modify 20 React components without any design pass; diverge from design system silently

description: In IJFW multi-CLI views badge each provider's output with provider color
do: Claude: blue badge; Codex: teal badge; Gemini: orange badge; consistent per session
avoid: Mix provider outputs without attribution; make multi-agent responses indistinguishable

description: Modal dialogs must trap focus; Escape must close; return focus on close
do: Use dialog element or aria-modal='true'; trap Tab/Shift+Tab inside; restore trigger focus
avoid: Let Tab escape modal; require click-only close; orphan focus after close

description: Tooltips must appear after 300ms delay; must not obscure adjacent content
do: Use CSS :hover + focus-visible trigger; 300ms delay; tooltip positioned clear of content
avoid: Show tooltips instantly on hover; place tooltip over the element that triggers it

description: Swipe gestures must have button alternatives; never swipe-only
do: Add visible back/dismiss button alongside swipe gesture support
avoid: Make delete available only via left-swipe without accessible alternative

description: Page transitions must be < 400ms; respect reduced motion; not block interaction
do: Use CSS transitions on .page elements at 300ms; immediately interactive after transition
avoid: Block user interaction during page transition; use 1s+ loading animation between pages

description: Use skeleton loaders not spinners for content areas that know their shape
do: Use <div aria-busy='true'> with skeleton CSS animation; match skeleton to content shape
avoid: Use center-screen spinner for every loading state including small inline loads

description: Electron apps should use native OS menus not custom HTML menus
do: Register native menu via Electron Menu API; use application menu for File Edit View
avoid: Build HTML custom menu bar that doesn't integrate with OS menu system; no keyboard shortcut support

description: PWA must include valid web app manifest with icons name and display mode
do: Add manifest.json with name short_name icons display:standalone start_url theme_color
avoid: Ship installable web app without manifest; use browser default name and icon

description: Run visual regression tests before shipping UI changes to production
do: Use Playwright Percy or Chromatic for visual diff on CI; compare against approved snapshots
avoid: Ship UI changes without visual regression; rely on manual QA of visual fidelity

description: Run automated accessibility scan (axe-core) in CI on every PR
do: Add axe-playwright or jest-axe to test suite; fail CI on new axe violations
avoid: Rely on manual accessibility review only; audit once at launch and never again

description: Verify all foreground/background color pairs against WCAG in automated tests
do: Use contrast-ratio npm package in tests; verify design tokens against WCAG thresholds
avoid: Accept designer's 'it looks fine' on color contrast without measurement
source: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.3 / IJFW Design System v1.1
